title: Use Case 5: Agent Proposes, Runtime Validates
summary: The agent proposes the AI summarizer for a French report, but the runtime rejects it under local-only constraints and selects the deterministic path instead.

sourceFragments: Local browser data includes a release note timeline and user-facing metrics.
Edge services expose compatibility summaries for active deployments.
Cloud analysis indicates that deterministic summaries are still accurate enough for this request.
